page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c1.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.c1 server family. It is provisioned with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core configuration. The instance features 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server type does not include local storage or bundled GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage for its operating system and data volumes. Virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor. Hardware-assisted features such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX-512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), and hardware-accelerated cryptography (AES, SHA_NI) are not supported on this instance profile.

With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.c1.large is structured for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention from neighboring tenants. This profile is suitable for compute-intensive tasks, batch processing, web serving, and lightweight application hosting where CPU execution is prioritized over memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c1.large is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance from the ecs.c1 family. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs with a single thread per core, paired with 16.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, prioritizing processing power over memory capacity. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor. Advanced CPU instruction sets, including AVX, AVX-512, and AMX, are not supported. Given its dedicated CPU allocation and compute-centric resource balance, the ecs.c1.large is designed for workloads such as batch processing, web serving, and compute-bound application hosting that require consistent CPU performance without the need for large memory allocations or local disk storage.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring eight vCPUs and sixteen gigabytes of memory for processing-focused workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
